title: draba cuzcoensis
intro: Draba cuzcoensis, also known as Andean draba or cuzco draba, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly the essential oils and compounds found in its roots, stems, and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Draba cuzcoensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Draba cuzcoensis typically involve infusion of the plant's leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
